title: More Vortex Manipulators
description:
"Cheap and nasty time travel!"
Providing more functionality to the TARDIS Mod Vortex Manipulator.
body:
This is an add-on mod for The [New TARDIS Mod](https://modrinth.com/mod/tardis-mod) which is required for this mod to work!

 

This mod adds new features to the Vortex Manipulator add-on. These features include a Bio-Scanner and Waypoint system. In the future you can expect more functions, variants and even other forms of travel in Minecraft 1.16.5

 

If you like this mod feel free to add me on Discord (Spectrum#4257) to enquire or talk about the mod. I'm 100% open to suggestions and would love to hear your ideas!

 

You can find the mod's wiki [here](https://github.com/SpectrumFATM/MoreVortexManipulators/wiki)!

 

And remember... Have fun!

![Vortex Manipulator Gif](https://cdn.modrinth.com/data/cached_images/3af47a9e6f842a1e5f348edecbceddc155095a15.gif)
